text.title: Supabase MVP Stack Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Supabase MVP Stack. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: New table shipped with RLS off; anyone with anon key reads every row.
antipattern.fix: Run RLS audit SQL; enable RLS; add scoped policies; rotate anon key if leaked.

antipattern.symptom: Policy `FOR SELECT TO public USING (true)` ships orders table publicly.
antipattern.fix: Replace with `USING (auth.uid() = user_id)`; test as anon vs authenticated; document.

antipattern.symptom: Column added in dashboard; local dev breaks; CI passes but prod fails.
antipattern.fix: Restore via `supabase migration new`; sync local; ban dashboard schema edits in policy.

antipattern.symptom: Channel users:all broadcasts email + phone to anonymous subscribers.
antipattern.root-cause: Channel design copied without payload review.
antipattern.fix: Per-channel payload review; drop PII columns; scope channel to authenticated + role.
